query:
INSERT INTO notification_log
                (event_id, event_type, channel, recipient_id,
                 status, last_error, payload, event_timestamp,
                 retry_count, total_attempts)
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4,
                    'SKIPPED', $5, $6, $7,
                    0, 0)
            ON CONFLICT (event_id, channel, recipient_id) DO NOTHING
